channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Beyond Balderdash
item.description:
Jiavani, Eugene, Corin, Grant, and Anna play Beyond Balderdash and provide new definitions for words.

Duration: 47:24

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, jiavani, eugene cordero, corin wells, grant o'brien, anna garcia
